name: Fitsume Teshome
alt: Maps of Kling-Gupta Efficiency (KGE) for streamflow simulations across the contiguous United States, comparing five meteorological forcing datasets: CPC, GRIDMET, W5E5, EWEMBI, and WFDEI.
citation: Teshome, F., Mekonnen, M.M., et al. Evaluation of gridded precipitation data in water availability modeling in CONUS. Journal of Hydrology.

name: Mahlet Melaku
alt: Adsorption kinetics and isotherm plots for PFOA, PFOS, PFBA, and PFBS on activated carbon.
citation: Kebede, M.M., Al Masud, M.A., Ortbal, S., Shin, W.S., Mekonnen, M.M., Clement, T.P., Terry, L.G. (2025). Adsorptive Removal of PFAS from Aqueous Solutions Using GAC, PAC and Ball-Milled Colloidal Activated Carbon. ACS ES&T Water, 5(11), 6554–6566.

name: Betelhem Wondimneh Demeke
alt: Sankey diagrams showing the green and blue water footprint of global crop production by crop group and end use, comparing 1972 and 2018.
citation: Demeke, B.W., Mekonnen, M.M., Brauman, K.A., Magliocca, N., Moradkhani, H. (2026). Global Spatially Detailed Water Footprint of Crop Production Over Five Decades. Scientific Reports.

name: Habtamu Tamiru
alt: Scatter plots showing deviations of calibrated and machine-learning-adjusted evaporative index from the Budyko curve across six different Budyko parameterizations.
citation: Tamiru, H., Mekonnen, M.M., Kumar, M. (2026). Improving Annual Streamflow Estimates Using Budyko Parameterization Driven by Catchment Attributes. Journal of Hydrology X, 30, 100216.
